purpose_context: Foundational mission. Everything else derives from this: the API reflects the model, and the CLI, stdio MCP server and console are all clients of that API. Binding: ADR 0003 identity is a surrogate key, ADR 0004 follow ActivityStreams except where it conflicts with project goals, ADR 0006 SQLite with typed columns plus a document column. The regression tests from missions 0016, 0020 and 0022 are requirements to re-satisfy, not archive.
purpose_tldr: Define the core messaging model on ActivityStreams: actors with hub-unique names, objects with URI ids, to/cc audience, inReplyTo threading — plus the LLM-first properties the fediverse has no answer for.
